# This file was automatically generated for projects
# without default 'CMakeLists.txt' file.

idf_build_get_property(MODE MODE)
if(MODE STREQUAL "parte1_1")
 FILE(GLOB_RECURSE app_sources ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/src/parte1_1/*.*)
elseif(MODE STREQUAL "parte1_2")
 FILE(GLOB_RECURSE app_sources ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/src/parte1_2/*.*)
elseif(MODE STREQUAL "parte2_1")
 FILE(GLOB_RECURSE app_sources ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/src/parte2_1/*.*)
 elseif(MODE STREQUAL "parte2_2")
 FILE(GLOB_RECURSE app_sources ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/src/parte2_2/*.*)
elseif(MODE STREQUAL "parte2_3")
 FILE(GLOB_RECURSE app_sources ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/src/parte2_3/*.*)
elseif(MODE STREQUAL "parte3_1")
 FILE(GLOB_RECURSE app_sources ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/src/parte3_1/*.*)
elseif(MODE STREQUAL "parte3_2a")
 FILE(GLOB_RECURSE app_sources ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/src/parte3_2a/*.*)
elseif(MODE STREQUAL "parte3_2b")
 FILE(GLOB_RECURSE app_sources ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/src/parte3_2b/*.*)
elseif(MODE STREQUAL "parte3_3a")
 FILE(GLOB_RECURSE app_sources ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/src/parte3_3a/*.*)
elseif(MODE STREQUAL "parte3_3b")
 FILE(GLOB_RECURSE app_sources ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/src/parte3_3b/*.*)
elseif(MODE STREQUAL "parte3_3c")
 FILE(GLOB_RECURSE app_sources ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/src/parte3_3c/*.*)
else()
 message(FATAL_ERROR "Selecciona el modo parte1_1, parte1_2, parte2_1, parte2_2, parte2_3, parte3_1, parte3_2a, parte3_2b, parte3_3a, parte3_3b o parte3_3c en Platformio.")
endif()
idf_component_register(SRCS ${app_sources})
